description: China Dasheng Bank Expression of Interest announcement
scope_of_work: Prequalification of OEMs/Authorized Partners for selection and implementation of a Core Banking System (CBS) supporting accounts management, transaction processing, customer information management, loan management, deposit management, omni-channel support, remittances, reporting/analytics, security, integration services, development workbench, customer support, and treasury/trade finance management.
eligibility: ['CBS software must have at least 8 installations in Tanzania', 'Perpetual license model recommended', 'Local experience for both OEM/Authorized partner and Implementor is critical', 'Understanding of Tanzania banking market requirements and regulatory reporting', 'Experience integrating with Tanzania regulatory systems (TISS, TIPS, TRA, GoAML, GePG, RTSIS)', 'Implementer must have experience with at least 4 banks in Tanzania', 'Minimum 2 end-to-end CBS implementations and data migrations in Eas
required_documents: Track record evidence in Core Banking System provision
Minimum 3 reference letters from traceable banks (preferably East Africa)

Professional Services for Valuers, Auctioneers, and Surveyors
description: Maendeleo Bank Plc invites qualified and experienced professionals to submit proposals for provision of professional services to support the Bank's operational and business needs.
scope_of_work: Provision of professional Valuation, Auctioneering, and Surveying services to support the Bank's operational and business needs. Valuation covers land, buildings, motor vehicles, equipment, and other assets. Auctioneering covers disposal of non-performing assets, repossessed collateral, and surplus items. Surveying covers land and property surveys, boundary verifications, and related services.
eligibility: ['Registration Certificate', 'VRN Certificate, Tax Clearance, TIN & VAT', 'Memorandum & Articles of Association', 'Certificate of Incorporation', 'Current Business Licenses (not expired)', 'Three recommendation letters from different clients', 'Professional Indemnity Insurance (Debt Collector TZS 300M, Valuer TZS 500M, Surveyor TZS 100M)', 'Warehouse/store to keep property/movable collateral (for Auctioneers)', 'Current Auctioneer general license (for Auctioneers)', 'Audited financial report for
required_documents: Company Profile detailing experience in similar assignments

title: Tender Notice: Full Rebranding of HACOCA
description: Huruma Aids Concern and Care (HACOCA), a registered non-governmental organization based in Morogoro, Tanzania, invites qualified firms and professionals to submit proposals for the full rebranding of HACOCA. The assignment will include redesigning the organization's visual identity, logo, website, communication materials, and brand guidelines to better reflect HACOCA's mission, vision, and values.
scope_of_work: Huruma Aids Concern and Care (HACOCA), a registered non-governmental organization based in Morogoro, Tanzania, invites qualified firms and professionals to submit proposals for the full rebranding of HACOCA. The assignment will include redesigning the organization's visual identity, logo, website, communication materials, and brand guidelines to better reflect HACOCA's mission, vision, and values.
eligibility: Interested firms/consultants must provide: Detailed technical and financial proposal; Valid business registration and tax compliance certificates; CVs of key team members; At least 3 samples of similar work for NGOs; Company/consultant profile with branding experience.

title: TERMS OF REFERENCE FOR CONSULTANCY TO CONDUCT BASELINE SURVEY
description: Policy Forum seeks to engage a qualified consultant or firm to conduct a comprehensive Baseline Survey for the project. The purpose is to establish benchmark data on key project indicators within targeted implementation areas. The baseline will generate reliable evidence on prevailing conditions, stakeholder perceptions, and existing governance and accountability practices.
scope_of_work: Policy Forum seeks to engage a qualified consultant or firm to conduct a comprehensive Baseline Survey for the project. The purpose is to establish benchmark data on key project indicators within targeted implementation areas. The baseline will generate reliable evidence on prevailing conditions, stakeholder perceptions, and existing governance and accountability practices.
